scripts.sync:server-assets: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const src=path.resolve('dist'); const dest=path.resolve('../guru-server/src/guru_server/web_assets'); fs.mkdirSync(dest, { recursive: true }); for (const entry of fs.readdirSync(dest)) { if (entry !== '.gitignore') fs.rmSync(path.join(dest, entry), { recursive: true, force: true }); } fs.cpSync(src, dest, { recursive: true });"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && npm run sync:server-assets
